get.description: Returns sales by wallet for the given date range

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records to return for pagination

parameters.name: tld
parameters.description: Top-level domain (TLD) of the name tokens to include. Leave empty to include all available TLDs.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date of the date range (Inclusive)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date of the date range (Inclusive)

200.description: Returns sales by wallet for the given date range.

400.description: Bad Request. No TLDs available for this API key.

401.description: Unauthorized. API Key is missing or invalid.

403.description: Forbidden. API Key is missing ANALYTICS permission.

post.description: Accepts validate coupon request. Allows validation of coupon code (requires COUPON permission).Returns the list of names with price information.

400.description: Bad Request. Some names are not available for purchase or coupon validation failed.

401.description: Unauthorized. API Key is missing or invalid.

403.description: Forbidden. API Key is missing COUPON permission.

post.description: Accepts mint name request. Only allows minting of non-premium name tokens (requires NON_PREMIUM_MINT permission).Token is not minted immediately but is scheduled for minting. Mint status could be checked using token status endpoint.

400.description: Bad Request. Unable to mint the requested name token.

401.description: Unauthorized. API Key is missing or invalid.

403.description: Forbidden. API Key is missing NON_PREMIUM_MINT permission.

409.description: Conflict. Name token is already minted.

get.description: Returns metadata and registration status of a name token.

parameters.name: tld
parameters.description: Top-level domain (TLD) of the name token.

parameters.name: sld
parameters.description: Second-level domain (SLD) of the name token.

400.description: Bad Request. Wrong SLD or TLD format.

401.description: Unauthorized. API Key is missing or invalid.

403.description: Forbidden. API Key is missing NON_PREMIUM_MINT permission.

404.description: Not Found. Name token is not registered and mint is not in progress.

get.description: Returns metadata of a name token by token ID.

parameters.name: chainId
parameters.description: Chain ID of the blockchain network.

parameters.name: contractAddress
parameters.description: NFT Smart Contract address.

parameters.name: tokenId
parameters.description: Minted Token ID.

401.description: Unauthorized. API Key is missing or invalid.

403.description: Forbidden. API Key is missing SEARCH permission.

404.description: Not Found. Name token does not exist for this contract on this chain or contract not found.

get.summary: Get name token metadata by token ID

post.description: Returns metadata of multiple name tokens by their token IDs.

parameters.name: chainId
parameters.description: Chain ID of the blockchain network.

parameters.name: contractAddress
parameters.description: NFT Smart Contract address.

400.description: Bad Request. Wrong address or address type format.

401.description: Unauthorized. API Key is missing or invalid.

403.description: Forbidden. API Key is missing SEARCH permission.

404.description: Not Found. Chain or Contract not found.

post.summary: Get name token metadata by multiple token IDs at once

get.description: Returns registered name tokens for a wallet address

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records to return for pagination.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Wallet address.

parameters.name: addressType
parameters.description: Wallet address type.

400.description: Bad Request. Wrong address or address type format.

401.description: Unauthorized. API Key is missing or invalid.

403.description: Forbidden. API Key is missing SEARCH permission.

get.summary: Get name tokens for a wallet address

get.description: Provides search, combining availability information and pricing, both in native token and USD.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records to return for pagination.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: tld
parameters.description: Top-level domain (TLD) of the name token to search for (comma separated list). Leave empty to search all available TLDs.

parameters.name: sld
parameters.description: Second-level domain (SLD) of the name token to search for (comma separated list)

401.description: Unauthorized. API Key is missing or invalid.

403.description: Forbidden. API Key is missing SEARCH permission.

get.summary: Search name tokens returning availability and pricing

get.description: Returns name recommendations based on the provided SLDs and TLDs

parameters.name: tld
parameters.description: Top-level domain (TLD) of the name token to recommend (comma separated list). Leave empty to recommend all available TLDs.

parameters.name: sld
parameters.description: Second-level domain (SLD) of the name token to recommend (comma separated list). Maximum of 5 SLDs allowed.

400.description: Invalid TLDs or other request issues

403.description: Forbidden. API Key is missing necessary permissions.

get.description: Returns the supported payment options (contract and token addresses) for the provided TLDs.

parameters.name: tld
parameters.description: Top-level domain (TLD) of the name token to fetch payment options (comma separated list). Leave empty to fetch for all available TLDs.

200.description: Returns payment options for name tokens.

401.description: Unauthorized. API Key is missing or invalid.

403.description: Forbidden. API Key is missing PURCHASE permission.

get.summary: Get supported payment methods for name tokens

post.description: Creates a new order for name token purchase. The response includes a payment voucher and details necessary to complete the purchase.

requestBody.description: Details required to create an order for name token purchase

201.description: The order has been successfully created.

400.description: Bad Request. Some names are not available for purchase.

403.description: Forbidden. API Key is missing necessary permissions.

post.summary: Create a partner order for name token purchase

post.description: Creates a new order for name token renewal. The response includes a payment voucher and details necessary to complete the renewal.

requestBody.description: Details required to create an order for name token renewal

201.description: The order has been successfully created.

400.description: Bad Request. Some names are not available for renewal.

403.description: Forbidden. API Key is missing necessary permissions.

post.summary: Create a partner order for name token renewal

post.description: Sets a web3 record for the specified domain name.

parameters.name: domainName
parameters.description: The domain name to set the web3 record for

400.description: Bad Request. Signature has expired or invalid.

401.description: Unauthorized. API Key is missing or invalid.

403.description: Forbidden. API Key is missing WALLET_MAPPING permission.

404.description: Not Found. Domain does not exist.

delete.description: Deletes a web3 record for the specified domain name.

parameters.name: domainName
parameters.description: The domain name to delete the web3 record from

400.description: Bad Request. Signature has expired or invalid.

401.description: Unauthorized. API Key is missing or invalid.

403.description: Forbidden. API Key is missing WALLET_MAPPING permission.

404.description: Not Found. Domain does not exist.

post.description: Sets the primary name for the specified wallet address.

delete.description: Unsets the primary name for the specified wallet address.

sld.description: Second-level domain (SLD) of the name to mint.

tld.description: Top-level domain (TLD) of the name to mint.

names.description: The list of names to apply the coupon to

sld.description: Second-level domain (SLD) of the name to mint.

tld.description: Top-level domain (TLD) of the name to mint.

finalPrice.description: Final price of the name, including discounts

names.description: The list of names with price information

wallet.description: Wallet address to mint the name for. Format is chain-specific, and depends on a chosen TLD.

email.description: Users email address. Used for renewal notifications and support.

sld.description: Second-level domain (SLD) of the name to mint.

tld.description: Top-level domain (TLD) of the name to mint.

networkId.description: CAIP-2 format chain ID in which this name will be automatically tokenized to. If not provided, it will be automatically tokenized to Doma Chain.

domainLength.description: The length of the domain registration in years

user.description: User information required to mint the name.

registrantContact.description: The registrant contact for ICANN TLDs

tokenId.description: Token ID that will be minted.

contractAddress.description: NFT Smart Contract address, which will be used to mint the token.

chainId.description: Chain ID of the blockchain network where the token will be minted. For EVM chains, Chain ID is returned.

sld.description: Second-level domain (SLD) of a name token. Only present when name token is registered.

tld.description: Top-level domain (TLD) of a name token. Only present when name token is registered.

registeredAt.description: Domain registration date. Only present when name token is registered.

expirationDate.description: Expiration date of a registered name token. May return a past date if the token has expired. Only present when name token is registered.

owner.description: Owner wallet address. Format is chain-specific. Only present when name token is registered.

tokenId.description: Minted Token ID. Only present when name token is registered.

contractAddress.description: NFT Smart Contract address. Only present when name token is registered.

chainId.description: Chain ID of the blockchain network. Only present when name token is registered or waiting for finalization.

txHash.description: Mint transaction hash. Only present when name token is waiting for finalization.

imageURL.description: Token image URL, only present if token is minted.

tokenIds.description: List of token ids to lookup for

sld.description: Second-level domain (SLD) of a name token.

tld.description: Top-level domain (TLD) of a name token.

registeredAt.description: Domain registration date. Only present when name token is registered.

expirationDate.description: Expiration date of a name token. May return a past date if the token has expired.

chainId.description: Chain ID of the blockchain network. Only present when name token is registered or waiting for finalization.

sld.description: Second-level domain (SLD) of a name token.

tld.description: Top-level domain (TLD) of a name token.

eoi.description: Indicates whether the name is an EOI name or ICANN domain.

isListed.description: When status is registered, indicates if there's an active listing for it.

registrationExpiresAt.description: When name is registered, indicates registration expiration date. Past expiration date means that the name has expired, but in a grace period now. It could be renewed by the current owner, or be back on the market after a grace period has passed.

reservationExpiresAt.description: When name is reserved, indicates reservation expiration date. When name is available, indicates reservation expiration date for the reserved user.

usdPrice.description: Price in USD (Deprecated, use registryUsdPrice instead)

nativeAmount.description: Price in native token (Deprecated, use registryNativePrice instead)

registryFirstYearUsdPrice.description: Price in USD for first year of registration

registryFirstYearNativePrice.description: Price in native token for first year of registration

listNativePrice.description: Price in native token for active listing

listUsdPrice.description: Price in USD for active listing

nativeCurrency.description: Native blockchain currency. Will be null if tokenization is unsupported for given TLD

lockExpiresAt.description: When name is locked, indicates lock expiration date. This is the date until which the domain remains locked, after which it may become available.

chainId.description: Chain ID of the blockchain network where the contract is deployed.

networkId.description: CAIP-2 chain ID of the blockchain network where the contract is deployed.

chainName.description: Name of the blockchain network where the contract is deployed.

addressType.description: Wallet address type for the current chain.

contractAddress.description: The contract address of the payment method

tokenAddress.description: The token address used in the payment method

symbol.description: The token symbol used in the payment method currency

icon.description: The token icon used in the payment method currency

price.description: The token price used in the payment method

options.description: Array of payment options, each containing contract and token addresses

contractAddress.description: The contract address of the payment method

networkId.description: CAIP-2 format chain ID in which this payment will be processed

tokenAddress.description: The token address used in the payment method

sld.description: Second-level domain (SLD) of the name to mint

tld.description: Top-level domain (TLD) of the name to mint

autoRenew.description: Whether to auto-renew the domain after it expires

domainLength.description: The length of the domain registration in years

paymentOptions.description: The payment options for the transaction

names.description: Array of names to mint, each including an SLD and TLD

registrantContact.description: The registrant contact for ICANN TLDs

voucher.description: The voucher details including names, amount, and expiration

signature.description: The signature of the voucher for submission

paymentOptions.description: The payment options for the transaction

names.description: Array of names to mint, each including an SLD and TLD

symbol.description: The symbol representing the asset or record, typically used as a short identifier (e.g., "BTC" for Bitcoin).

address.description: The address to associate with the domain and symbol. This is typically a blockchain address.

signature.description: The signature generated by the registrant's wallet, authorizing this operation.

signatureExpiresAt.description: The UNIX timestamp (in milliseconds) when the signature expires.

symbol.description: The symbol representing the asset or record, typically used as a short identifier (e.g., "BTC" for Bitcoin).

signature.description: The signature generated by the registrant's wallet, authorizing this operation.

signatureExpiresAt.description: The UNIX timestamp (in milliseconds) when the signature expires.

name.description: The name to set as the primary name for the wallet

signature.description: The signature to verify the request

signatureExpiresAt.description: The timestamp when the signature expires

signature.description: The signature to verify the request

signatureExpiresAt.description: The timestamp when the signature expires
